cc:Work.dc:title: Tray - PenHolderBox
cc:Work.dc:description:
PenHolderBox: Open pen holder box with two internal grid plates.
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes PenHolderBox Command line short: boxes PenHolderBox
